metadata.description: Safety hooks for Claude Code — 650+ battle-tested hooks from 800+ hours of autonomous operation

plugins.name: safety-essentials
plugins.description: 5 essential safety hooks: block rm -rf, force-push, hard-reset, env overwrites, and package publish. The minimum viable safety net.

plugins.name: git-protection
plugins.description: Git safety hooks: block force-push, protect main/master, prevent hard-reset, guard rebase, and auto-backup before destructive operations.

plugins.name: credential-guard
plugins.description: Protect secrets and credentials: block writes to .env files, detect API keys in commands, prevent hardcoded tokens, guard service account files.
